Special agents with the New Mexico Attorney General's office later concluded that now former officer Brad Lunsford's use of force was quote not reasonable under the circumstances and that other less lethal options could have been used. Brad was charged with voluntary manslaughter and later found guilty by a jury. However, before facing sentencing that investigator said could have resulted in up to nine years in prison, Brad was granted a new trial by a judge due to juror issues. At last check, the new trial date has not yet been set.
